method: Explore-agent read of 12+ prefill docs; live vs stale/retracted tagged
key_reconciliation: The dependency-free build_gemm_lds2 is at GPU-LEVEL PARITY-TO-+10% with vendored Tensile on the actual prefill shape (512x12288x4096). The historical '8% behind / ~92%' readings were MEASUREMENT ARTIFACTS (interleave-perturbation + run_linear host overhead at batch=1), both identified+excluded. NO real residual kernel deficit on this shape.
only_real_residual: PMC-hard-audit: ours = +23% VALU instructions (8.66M vs 7.04M) from per-iteration address/index arithmetic; small residual LDS bankcf (2.93 vs 0); ours has HIGHER L2 hit. Named lever: addressing-mode leanness (hoist+strength-reduce index math) -- NOT prefetch/L2/occupancy (those tried/refuted).
retracted: whole bimodal/WMMA-boost/clock-lottery saga = ONE flag-leak bug (qk_tensile_ab_measure built jon before joff captured)
WGM8 L2-locality edge for Tensile (REFUTED: ours higher L2)
'latency-bound hidden by occupancy' (REFUTED by occupancy diag)
SIA1/PLR1/PGR1 as the gap-cause (decoded-what-Tensile-does, NOT-proven-why; prefetch tried, didn't close)
noise_traps: nosync realize() loop inflates ~2.3x (qk_prefill_v2_measure IS nosync) -> always dev.synchronize()
auto-boost inflates best-of-N -> pin rocm-smi --setperflevel high
interleaving foreign .co perturbs your kernel -> measure alone
run_linear host overhead dominates batch=1 -> K-batch amortize
LDS-kernel TFLOPS occupancy-confounded -> report LDS bytes
shape_coverage: primary M=512,N=12288,K=4096 (ffn gate/up); sweep shows ours rises monotonically with wg-count, matches/beats Tensile on well-occupied shapes (1536x8192 = 1.08x ours wins); SINGLE-SHAPE-FAMILY caveat: q/o-proj parity PROJECTED not exhaustively measured; NO dependency-free/Tensile kernel for attention COMPUTE (QK/PV)
